UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FILLMORE CENTER ASSOCIATES, LP, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED PARTNERSHIP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JIANG, JIANYI AN INDIVIDUAL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1425 FILLMORE STREET, #407, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94115, LEASE FORFEITED, ***PLEASE INCLUDE ALL UNKNOWN OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INTO THE JUDGMENT*** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
REMARK: FILE IS DESTROYED PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153. ORDER SIGNED AND FILED ON JAN-27-2026.

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FILLMORE CENTER ASSOCIATES, LP, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED PARTNERSHIP AS TO DEFENDANT JIANG, JIANYI AN INDIVIDUAL DOES 1 THROUGH 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
